Chapter one — beautiful skin

Not a product story. A story of skin that is loved, every single day.

For generations, Clere has been the jar on the shelf that families reach for — morning after morning, from the first cold season to the warmest one.

Chapter two — hydration

Moisture that stays from morning to morning

Like cream folding into cream — soft, slow, and deeply absorbed.

48-hourintense moisture lock, so one routine carries the whole day and the next
Glycerine-richhumectant care that draws moisture in and holds it against the skin
Fast absorbingnourishment without heaviness — ready for the day in moments
Chapter three — what's inside

Honest ingredients, generous formulas

Lanolin & Glycerine

The classic Clere pairing — lanolin softens and protects while pure glycerine draws in lasting moisture for radiant, glowing skin.

Cocoa Butter

Warm, rich and deeply nourishing — melts into skin to smooth dryness and leave a soft, healthy sheen.

Tissue Oil

A restorative oil that helps care for the look of scars, stretch marks and uneven texture — the heart of the 2-in-1 Duo and Gly-Co-Oil.

Black Castor Oil + Vitamin B3

The Gly-Co-Oil signature — hydrates, soothes and revitalises to help even skin tone.

Ginseng Ultra

An energising boost in the For Men Active range — fast absorbing 48-hour care for normal to dry skin.

Multi-Vitamin Serum

Vitamins E & A woven through the nourishing range, feeding skin as it moisturises.

Tap the jar to turn it
Chapter four — the duo

One jar. A hidden second step.

The 2-in-1 Duo pairs nourishing body crème with a bottle of Clere Tissue Oil, tucked neatly into the jar itself — 48-hour moisture plus targeted repair, together.

  • Nourishing body crème with glycerine & multi-vitamin serum
  • Tissue oil for the look of scars, stretch marks & dryness
  • 400 ml crème + tissue oil in one pack

Choose your skin's mood

Each choice gently changes the atmosphere of the page — and gathers the products made for that need.

Chapter seven — for men

Built for the pace of an active day

Clere For Men Active — fast-absorbing body creme and lotion with ProMoist™, glycerine, omega oils and vitamins E & A. 48-hour moisture for normal to dry skin.
